name: Wrath
description:
You walk through the woods on a trail as it gets dark, past dusk but not exactly night. You lost track of time but your too far in that turning around would take longer, then you hear a scrape of a foot step behind you.

Art is not mine, everything else about him is mine. Let me know if anything needs changing in the reviews, I'll check and see what I can do.

TW: Rape, Heavy abuse, gore, torcher, potentially CBD
